Simple process

How it works

Getting covered is simple. Register your boat, pay securely online, and we handle the rest.

01

Register Your Boat

Fill out your boat details and personal information. We use your address to match you with the closest certified dealer in your area.

02

Pay Securely Online

Complete your $4,000 annual contract payment through our secure Stripe checkout. Your contract activates immediately.

03

Stay Protected

Your assigned dealer will reach out to schedule your services. Enjoy the water knowing everything is covered.

What's included

Twelve services.
One flat rate.

Every Whitestone Partners contract covers twelve core services your boat needs year after year.

01

Basic Summer Prep Inboard

Full inboard engine commissioning to get your vessel ready for the season.

02

Basic Summer Prep Outboard

Complete outboard engine commissioning and seasonal readiness inspection.

03

Fuel System Service

Fuel filter replacement, line inspection, and fuel system performance check.

04

Impeller Cooling System Service

Water pump impeller inspection and replacement to protect engine cooling.

05

Engine Oil Service

Full engine oil and filter replacement using manufacturer-specified grade.

06

Transmission Oil Service

Transmission fluid inspection, replacement, and shift cable adjustment.

07

Outdrive Service

Outdrive fluid service, bellows inspection, and anode check.

08

Drivetrain Alignment Service

Drive alignment check and adjustment for optimal performance.

09

V Drive Oil Service

V-drive gear oil inspection and replacement for smooth power transfer.

10

Brake Fluid Service Flush

Complete brake fluid flush and replacement for safe stopping performance.

11

Trailer Tire Rotation

Trailer tire rotation and inspection to maximize tire life and towing safety.

12

Full Trailer Service

Comprehensive trailer inspection including bearings, brakes, lights, and frame.

Questions

Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about your Whitestone Partners contract.

What does the contract cover?⌄
Your contract covers twelve essential services: Basic Summer Prep Inboard, Basic Summer Prep Outboard, Fuel System Service, Impeller Cooling System Service, Engine Oil Service, Transmission Oil Service, Outdrive Service, Drivetrain Alignment Service, V Drive Oil Service, Brake Fluid Service Flush, Trailer Tire Rotation, and Full Trailer Service.
How much does it cost?⌄
The annual contract is $4,000 per year. This is a flat rate that covers all twelve services — no additional per-service charges or hidden fees.
Who performs the services?⌄
All services are performed by certified Whitestone Partners dealers. After you register, we match you with a dealer in your area who will manage your contract and schedule your services.
How do I schedule a service?⌄
Once enrolled, your assigned dealer will contact you to schedule your services. You can also reach out to them directly at any time throughout the year.
Is my payment secure?⌄
Yes — all payments are processed securely through Stripe. Your card details never touch our servers.
What boats are eligible?⌄
Most recreational powerboats are eligible. Contact us at [email protected] if you have questions about your specific vessel.

Ready to protect your boat?

Join boat owners who trust Whitestone Partners to keep their vessels running season after season.
